SYS_RECONNECT_FAIL_HINT: Neural Engine unreachable. Verify infrastructure URL.
SYS_CRITICAL_EXCEPTION: A critical rendering exception was detected in this sector.
ENG_TOOLTIP_MAIN: Neural Engine Telemetry: Real-time system performance and swarm health
ENG_TOOLTIP_CPU: Current computational load of the Tadpole OS backend engine
ENG_TOOLTIP_MEMORY: Total RAM allocated to agent contexts and neural caches
ENG_TOOLTIP_LATENCY: Average round-trip time for agent-to-model inference cycles
MET_ACTIVE_AGENTS_TOOLTIP: Total agents assigned to active mission clusters vs system capacity.
MET_ACTIVE_CLUSTERS_TOOLTIP: Currently deployed mission clusters vs system limit.
MET_NODES_ONLINE_TOOLTIP: Real-time telemetry of neural nodes connected to the Tadpole Engine.
MET_MAX_DEPTH_TOOLTIP: Maximum recursion depth allowed for autonomous agent delegation.
MET_TASK_LIMIT_TOOLTIP: Maximum context length (tokens) per neural inference cycle.
MET_BASE_BUDGET_TOOLTIP: Default neural credit allocation for new swarm branches.
STAT_ACTIVE_SWARM_TOOLTIP: Percentage of agent nodes currently processing neural directives
STAT_SWARM_COST_TOOLTIP: Accreted infrastructure and token costs for the current session
STAT_SWARM_CAPACITY_TOOLTIP: Allocated budget utilization across the entire cluster
STAT_RECRUITMENT_VELOCITY_TOOLTIP: Total number of sovereign agents initialized in the last 24 hours.
STAT_SWARM_TOKENS_TOOLTIP: Total aggregated token consumption across the entire swarm.
STAT_SYSTEM_HEALTH_TOOLTIP: Real-time verification of the Neural Engine gateway status.
TEL_SWARM_DENSITY_TOOLTIP: Current agent count vs. maximum capacity. High density can impact latency and resource overhead.
TEL_LOGIC_DEPTH_TOOLTIP: The maximum recursive depth of agent chains. Deeper chains allow for complex problem solving but increase execution time.
TEL_SWARM_VELOCITY_TOOLTIP: The rate of new agent recruitment and task distribution. High velocity indicates rapid scaling of the swarm.
TEL_FISCAL_BURN_TOOLTIP: Estimated operational cost per hour based on current token usage and recruiter demand.
SET_TOOLTIP_SAVE: Persist all configuration changes to local storage and engine
SET_TOOLTIP_API_URL: The base URL where the Tadpole OS Rust engine is running (e.g., http://localhost:8000)
SET_DESC_API_URL: The accessible URL of your local Tadpole Engine process.
SET_TOOLTIP_API_TOKEN: Secure API key for engine authentication (NEURAL_TOKEN)
SET_DESC_API_TOKEN: Required for remote orchestration and infrastructure sync.
SET_TOOLTIP_THEME: Select the foundational color palette and visual style for the Tadpole OS interface
SET_TOOLTIP_DENSITY: Adjust the spacing and scale of UI elements to prioritize either readability or information density
SET_TOOLTIP_DEFAULT_MODEL: Primary AI model used for newly deployed agents and general swarm orchestration
SET_DESC_DEFAULT_MODEL: The baseline model assigned to new agents or unconfigured nodes.
SET_TOOLTIP_TEMPERATURE: Controls the randomness and creativity of model responses (0.0 = deterministic, 2.0 = highly creative)
SET_TOOLTIP_AUTO_APPROVE: Allows low-risk skills (like reasoning, search, and formatting) to execute without manual confirmation
SET_DESC_AUTO_APPROVE: When enabled, low-risk skills like {{param:skills}} will execute automatically without manual user approval.
SET_GOVERNANCE_QUOTE: "Autonomous execution of Safe Skills preserves mission momentum while maintaining human governance over high-risk operations."
SET_TOOLTIP_PRIVACY_MODE: Privacy Shield: When enabled, all external cloud traffic (Gemini, OpenAI, etc.) is blocked at the engine level. Agents are restricted to local providers only.
SET_DESC_PRIVACY_MODE_ON: AIR-GAP ACTIVE: External cloud calls are blocked. Swarm is operating in high-security, local-only mode.
SET_DESC_PRIVACY_MODE_OFF: Hybrid mode active. Cloud providers are available for high-complexity reasoning.
SET_TOOLTIP_MAX_AGENTS: Hard limit on the number of concurrent neural nodes allowed across all clusters
SET_TOOLTIP_MAX_CLUSTERS: Maximum number of simultaneous mission branches that can be active
SET_TOOLTIP_MAX_DEPTH: Upper limit on the agent delegation tree depth (recursive recruitment)
SET_TOOLTIP_MAX_TOKENS: Maximum character count for individual task instructions and agent responses
SET_TOOLTIP_MISSION_BUDGET: Default neural credit allocation for newly initialized missions
SET_DESC_ARCHITECTURE_ALERT: Settings here enforce hard constraints on swarm growth. Adjusting depth or agent count directly impacts the engine's recursive capacity.
SET_DESC_TEMPLATE_STORE: Browse, discover, and install pre-configured agent swarms tailored for specific industries (Legal, Healthcare, etc.). Powered natively by GitHub MCP.
BENCH_TOOLTIP_MAIN: Deep system performance metrics and wall-clock latency analysis for sovereign neural nodes.
BENCH_TOOLTIP_RUNNER: Benchmark the core agent execution pipeline.
BENCH_TOOLTIP_DB: Benchmark persistence and database I/O latency.
BENCH_TOOLTIP_RL: Benchmark rate-limiting and neural throttling performance.
BENCH_DELETE_ARIA: Purge Provider from Registry (Confirm by typing 'DESTROY')
BENCH_CONFIRM_DELETE: Are you sure? This node's neural configuration will be purged.
BENCH_TOOLTIP_DELTA: Variance breakdown between baseline and current neural candidate.
BENCH_TOOLTIP_COMPARE: Select two historical runs to perform wall-clock latency comparison.
BENCH_EMPTY: No benchmarks recorded. Run `cargo bench` to initialize telemetry.
